text: Ḥā, Meem.
tl: Haa-Meeem

text: The revelation of the Book is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
tl: Tanzeelul Kitaabi minal laahil 'Azeezil Hakeem

text: Indeed, within the heavens and earth are signs for the believers.
tl: Innaa fis samaawaati wal-ardi la-Aayaatil lilmu'mineen

text: And in the creation of yourselves and what He disperses of moving creatures are signs for people who are certain [in faith].
tl: Wa-fee khalaqikum Wa-maa yabussu min daaabbatin Aayaatul liqawmien yooqinoon

text: And [in] the alternation of night and day and [in] what Allāh sends down from the sky of provision [i.e., rain] and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness and [in His] directing of the winds are signs for a people who reason.
tl: Wakhtilaafil laili wannahaari Wa-maaa anzalal laahu minas samaaa'i mir rizqin fa-ahyaa bihil arda ba'da mawtihaa Wa-tasreefir riyaahi Aayaatul liqawminy ya'qiloon

text: These are the verses of Allāh which We recite to you in truth. Then in what statement after Allāh and His verses will they believe?
tl: Tilka Aayatul laahi natloohaa 'alaika bil-haqq, fabiayyi hadeesim ba'dal laahi Wa-Aayaatihee yu'minoon

text: Woe to every sinful liar
tl: Wailul likulli affaakin aseem

text: Who hears the verses of Allāh recited to him, then persists arrogantly as if he had not heard them. So give him tidings of a painful punishment.
tl: Yasma'u Aayaatil laahi tutlaa 'alaihi summa yusirru mustakbiran ka-al lam yasma'haa fabashshirhu bi'azaabin aleem

text: And when he knows anything of Our verses, he takes them in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment.
tl: Wa-izaa 'alima min Aayaatinaa shai'-'anit takhazahaa huzuwaa; ulaaa'ika lahum 'azaabum muheen

text: Before them is Hell, and what they had earned will not avail them at all nor what they had taken besides Allāh as allies. And they will have a great punishment.
tl: Minw waraaa'ihim Jahannamu Wa-laa yughnee 'anhum maa kasaboo shai'anw Wa-laa mat takhazoo min doonil laahi awliyaaa; Wa-lahum 'azaabun 'azeem

text: This [Qur’ān] is guidance. And those who have disbelieved in the verses of their Lord will have a painful punishment of foul nature.
tl: Haazaa hudaa; wal-lazeena kafaroo bi-aayaati Rabbihim lahum 'azaabum mir rijzin 'aleem

text: It is Allāh who subjected to you the sea so that ships may sail upon it by His command and that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.
tl: Allaahul lazee sahkhara lakumul bahra litajriyal fulku feehi bi-amrihee Wa-litabtaghoo min fadlihee Wa-la'allakum tashkuroon

text: And He has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth - all from Him. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
tl: Wa-sakhkhara lakum maa fis samaawaati Wa-maa fil ardi jamee'am minhu; inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil liqawmien yatafakkaroon

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], to those who have believed that they [should] forgive those who expect not the days of Allāh [i.e., of His retribution] so that He may recompense a people for what they used to earn.
tl: Qul lillazeena aamanoo yaghfiroo lillazeena laa yarjoona ayyaamal laahi liyajziya qawmam bimaa kaanoo yaksiboon

text: Whoever does a good deed - it is for himself; and whoever does evil - it is against it [i.e., the self or soul]. Then to your Lord you will be returned.
tl: Maa 'amila saalihan falinafsihee Wa-man asaaa'a fa'alaihaa summa ilaa Rabbikum turja'oon

text: And We did certainly give the Children of Israel the Scripture and judgement and prophethood, and We provided them with good things and preferred them over the worlds.
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Baneee Israaa'eelal Kitaaba walhukma wan Nubuwwata Wa-razaqnaahum minat taiyibaati Wa-faddalnaahum;alal 'aalameen

text: And We gave them clear proofs of the matter [of religion]. And they did not differ except after knowledge had come to them - out of jealous animosity between themselves. Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ.
tl: Wa-aatainaahum baiyinaatim minal amri famakh talafooo illaa mim ba'di maa jaaa'ahumul 'ilmu baghyam bainahum; inna Rabbaka yaqdee bainahum Yawmal Qiyaamati feemaa kaanoo feehi yakhtalifoon

text: Then We put you, [O Muḥammad], on an ordained way concerning the matter [of religion]; so follow it and do not follow the inclinations of those who do not know.
tl: Summa ja'alnaaka 'alaa sharee'atim minal amri fattabi'haa Wa-laa tattabi' ahwaaa' al-lazeena laa ya'lamoon

text: Indeed, they will never avail you against Allāh at all. And indeed, the wrongdoers are allies of one another; but Allāh is the protector of the righteous.
tl: Innahum laien yughnoo 'anka minal laahi shai'aa; Wa-innaz zaalimeena ba'duhum awliyaaa'u ba'dinw wallaahu waliyyul muttaqeen

text: This [Qur’ān] is enlightenment for mankind and guidance and mercy for a people who are certain [in faith].
tl: Haazaa basaaa'iru linnaasi Wa-hudanw Wa-rahmatul liqawmien yooqinoon

text: Or do those who commit evils think We will make them like those who have believed and done righteous deeds - [make them] equal in their life and their death? Evil is that which they judge [i.e., assume].
tl: Am hasibal lazeenaj tarahus saiyyiaati an naj'alahum kallazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilu saalihaati sawaaa'am mahyaahum Wa-mamaatuhum; saaa'a maa yahkumoon

text: And Allāh created the heavens and earth in truth and so that every soul may be recompensed for what it has earned, and they will not be wronged.
tl: Wa-khalaqal laahus samaawaati wal-arda bilhaqqi Wa-litujzaa kullu nafsim bimaa kasabat Wa-hum laa yuzlamoon

text: Have you seen he who has taken as his god his [own] desire, and Allāh has sent him astray due to knowledge and has set a seal upon his hearing and his heart and put over his vision a veil? So who will guide him after Allāh? Then will you not be reminded?
tl: Afara'ayta manit takhaza ilaahahoo hawaahu Wa-adal-lahul laahu 'alaa 'ilminw Wa-khatama 'alaa sam'ihee Wa-qalbihee Wa-ja'ala 'alaa basarihee ghishaawatan famaien yahdeehi mim ba'dil laah; afalaa tazakkaroon

text: And they say, \"There is not but our worldly life; we die and live, and nothing destroys us except time.\" And they have of that no knowledge; they are only assuming.
tl: Wa-qaaloo maa hiya illaa hayaatunad dunyaa namootu Wa-nahyaa Wa-maa yuhlikunaaa illad dahr; Wa-maa lahum bizaalika min 'ilmin in hum illaa yazunnoon

text: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, their argument is only that they say, \"Bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful.\"
tl: Wa-izaa tutlaa 'alaihim aayaatuna baiyinaatim maa kaana hujjatahum illaaa an qaalu'too bi aabaaa'inaaa in kuntum saadiqeen

text: Say, \"Allāh causes you to live, then causes you to die; then He will assemble you for the Day of Resurrection, about which there is no doubt, but most of the people do not know.\"
tl: Qulil laahu yuhyeekum summa yumeetukum summa yajma'ukum ilaa Yawmil Qiyaamati laa raiba feehi Wa-laakinna aksaran naasi laa ya'lamoon

text: And to Allāh belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And the Day the Hour appears - that Day the falsifiers will lose.
tl: Wa-lillaahi mulkus samaawaati wal-ard; Wa-Yawma taqoomus Saa'atu Yawma-'izien yakhsarul mubtiloon

text: And you will see every nation kneeling [from fear]. Every nation will be called to its record [and told], \"Today you will be recompensed for what you used to do.
tl: Wa-taraa kulla ummatin jaasiyah; kullu ummatin tud'aaa ilaa kitaabihaa al-Yawma tujzawna maa kuntum ta'maloon

text: This, Our record, speaks about you in truth. Indeed, We were having transcribed whatever you used to do.\"
tl: Haazaa kitaabunaa yantiqu 'alaikum bilhaqq; innaa kunnaa nastansikhu maa kuntum ta'maloon

text: So as for those who believed and did righteous deeds, their Lord will admit them into His mercy. That is what is the clear attainment.
tl: Fa-ammal lazeena aamaanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati fayudkhiluhum Rabbuhum fee rahmatih; zaalika huwal fawzul mubeen

text: But as for those who disbelieved, [it will be said], \"Were not Our verses recited to you, but you were arrogant and became a criminal people?
tl: Wa-ammal lazeena kafarooo afalam takun Aayaatee tutlaa 'alaikum fastakbartum Wa-kuntum qawmam mujrimeen

text: And when it was said, 'Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth and the Hour [is coming] - no doubt about it,' you said, 'We know not what is the Hour. We assume only assumption, and we are not convinced.'\"
tl: Wa-izaa qeela inna wa'dallaahi haqqunw was Saa'atu laa raiba feehaa qultum maa nadree mas Saa'atu in nazunnu illaa zannanw Wa-maa nahnu bimustaiqineen

text: And the evil consequences of what they did will appear to them, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
tl: Wa-badaa lahum saiyyiaatu maa 'amiloo Wa-haaqa bihim maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: And it will be said, \"Today We will forget you as you forgot the meeting of this Day of yours, and your refuge is the Fire, and for you there are no helpers.
tl: Wa-qeelal yawma nansaakum kamaa naseetum liqaaa'a yawmikum haazaa Wa-maawaakumun Naaru Wa-maa lakum min naasireen

text: That is because you took the verses of Allāh in ridicule, and worldly life deluded you.\" So that Day they will not be removed from it, nor will they be asked to appease [Allāh].
tl: Zaalikum bi-annakumut takhaztum aayaatil laahi huzuwanw Wa-gharratkumul hayaatud dunyaa; fal yawma laa yukhrajoona minhaa Wa-laahum yusta'taboon

text: Then, to Allāh belongs [all] praise - Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth, Lord of the worlds.
tl: Falillaahil hamdu Rabbis samaawaati Wa-Rabbil ardi Rabbil 'aalameen

text: And to Him belongs [all] grandeur within the heavens and the earth, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
tl: Wa-lahul kibriyaaa'u fis samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-Huwal 'Azeezul Hakeem
